nasb.text: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered before the Lord, And do not let the sin of his mother be blotted out.

esv.text: May the iniquity of his fathers be remembered before the Lord, and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out!

cnv.text: 願他列祖的罪孽被耶和華謹記； 願他母親的罪惡不被塗抹。

ccb.text: 愿耶和华记住他祖辈的罪恶， 不除去他母亲的罪过。

csbs.text: 愿他祖先的罪孽被记在耶和华面前， 不要让他母亲的罪被抹掉。
